ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., ChIP-Seq, gene expression, H3K9me3) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., public database, in-house experiment) */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the data is from */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the data is from */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of cells the data is from */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design */,
  "publication_id" TEXT /* ID of the publication if the data is part of a published study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "data_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., ChIP-Seq, gene expression, H3K9me3) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTQ, BAM, bed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., FASTQ, BAM, bed) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the file was last modified */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand the gene is on (e.g., +, -) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_datasets" (
  "gene_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-dataset pair */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_datasets_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "overlap" (
  "overlap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overlap */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "overlap_number" INTEGER /* Number of overlapping genes */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the overlap */,
  "adjusted_p_value" REAL /* Adjusted p-value for the overlap */,
  "overlap_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being compared for overlap */,
  "overlap_type" TEXT /* Type of overlap (e.g., gene, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overlap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overlap_overlap_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("overlap_dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_overlap_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "trained_on" TEXT /* Dataset or datasets the model was trained on */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model-dataset pair */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained on the dataset */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Validation metrics of the model on the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model-dataset pair */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_dataset_id") REFERENCES model_datasets ("model_dataset_id")
)
